S1.name: IPTV/HLS Architect
S1.mission: RFC 8216 compliance, M3U Plus emission, channel ordering, dedup

S3.name: Video Codec Engineer
S3.mission: H.264/H.265/H.266/AV1/VP9 profile-level coherence + RFC 6381 codec strings

S5.name: QoE/QoS Researcher
S5.mission: Startup time, rebuffer ratio, stall count, VMAF/SSIM estimates, MOS

S6.name: Nginx/OpenResty/Lua Engineer
S6.mission: nginx -t, Lua phases, passthrough doctrine, no destructive cache

S7.name: Linux VPS/SRE Engineer
S7.mission: systemd, watchdogs, health checks, runbook 365 days

S8.name: Network/TCP/QUIC Engineer
S8.mission: BBR, initcwnd, MTU, HTTP/2/3, WireGuard nested tunnels

S9.name: hls.js/MSE/Android TV Player Engineer
S9.mission: hls.js, ExoPlayer, OTT Navigator, TiviMate, Kodi, VLC, Android TV

S10.name: Security/Auth/Headers Engineer
S10.mission: Toxic header blocker, signed URLs, secret scanner, CORS, rate limit

skills.name: iptv-hls-validator
skills.description: Use when validating M3U/M3U Plus/HLS playlists for RFC 8216 compliance, dead URLs, missing tvg-* attrs, duplicates, or player-incompatible tag placement.

skills.name: m3u8-playlist-surgeon
skills.description: Use when refactoring monolithic M3U8 generators, deduplicating channels, normalizing EXTINF lines, or reordering by country/category/quality without breaking line count.

skills.name: hls-rfc8216-master-playlist-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting an HLS master playlist with multiple EXT-X-STREAM-INF variants and EXT-X-MEDIA renditions.

skills.name: hls-rfc8216-media-playlist-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting an HLS media playlist (segments list) with EXTINF + URI lines and required EXT-X-TARGETDURATION / EXT-X-MEDIA-SEQUENCE.

skills.name: extm3u-header-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting the first line `#EXTM3U` with M3U Plus attributes (x-tvg-url, refresh, catchup).

skills.name: extinf-line-formatter
skills.description: Use when formatting an `#EXTINF:-1 tvg-id="..." tvg-name="..." tvg-logo="..." group-title="...",CHANNEL_NAME` line per M3U Plus convention.

skills.name: ext-x-version-selector
skills.description: Use when picking `#EXT-X-VERSION:N` value (3 baseline, 6 for IFRAMES-ONLY, 7 for SAMPLE-AES, 8 for VARIABLE substitution, 9 for IMSC1 subs).

skills.name: ext-x-stream-inf-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-STREAM-INF:BANDWIDTH=...,RESOLUTION=...,CODECS="..."` in a master playlist.

skills.name: ext-x-media-renditions-handler
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-MEDIA:TYPE=AUDIO|SUBTITLES|VIDEO|CLOSED-CAPTIONS,GROUP-ID=...,NAME=...,URI=...` alternates.

skills.name: ext-x-i-frame-stream-inf-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-I-FRAME-STREAM-INF` for trick-play seek thumbnails in a master playlist.

skills.name: ext-x-targetduration-validator
skills.description: Use when validating that no `#EXTINF:N` exceeds the declared `#EXT-X-TARGETDURATION`.

skills.name: ext-x-media-sequence-tracker
skills.description: Use when emitting / validating `#EXT-X-MEDIA-SEQUENCE` monotonicity across reload polls.

skills.name: ext-x-discontinuity-handler
skills.description: Use when marking PTS/DTS discontinuities with `#EXT-X-DISCONTINUITY` between segments from different sources.

skills.name: ext-x-discontinuity-sequence-tracker
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-DISCONTINUITY-SEQUENCE` after sliding-window playlist roll where discontinuities have left the window.

skills.name: ext-x-key-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-KEY:METHOD=AES-128|SAMPLE-AES|NONE` for HLS encryption.

skills.name: ext-x-session-key-emitter
skills.description: Use when pre-fetching keys via `#EXT-X-SESSION-KEY` in a master playlist before first segment fetch.

skills.name: ext-x-byterange-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-BYTERANGE:LEN[@OFFSET]` for sub-range segment fetches from a single resource.

skills.name: ext-x-program-date-time-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-PROGRAM-DATE-TIME:YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ` to anchor playlist time to wall clock.

skills.name: ext-x-daterange-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-DATERANGE` for ad markers, SCTE-35 splice cues, or EPG windows.

skills.name: ext-x-content-steering-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-CONTENT-STEERING:SERVER-URI="...",PATHWAY-ID="..."` for multi-CDN steering.

skills.name: ext-x-define-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-DEFINE:NAME=...,VALUE=...` variables (HLS v8+) and substituting `{$NAME}` in URIs.

skills.name: ext-x-session-data-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-SESSION-DATA:DATA-ID="reverse.dns.id",VALUE="..."` metadata in master playlists.

skills.name: tvg-id-tvg-name-formatter
skills.description: Use when filling tvg-id / tvg-name attributes from EPG sources (xmltv) for OTT Navigator / TiviMate EPG matching.

skills.name: tvg-logo-url-validator
skills.description: Use when validating tvg-logo URLs return 200 OK with image content-type and reasonable size (<500 KB).

skills.name: group-title-categorizer
skills.description: Use when normalizing group-title into canonical categories (Deportes/Cine/Noticias/Infantil/Música/Adultos/Internacional).

skills.name: xtream-codes-url-parser
skills.description: Use when parsing Xtream Codes URLs `http://host:port/username/password/stream_id` into structured components.

skills.name: flussonic-catchup-url-builder
skills.description: Use when building Flussonic catchup URLs `?utc={utc}&lutc={lutc}` for time-shift / DVR replay.

skills.name: shielded-suffix-renamer
skills.description: Use when renaming output file to `_SHIELDED.m3u8` (filename-only treatment per VPS shield doctrine). NEVER transform inner channel URLs.

skills.name: single-url-per-channel-enforcer
skills.description: Use when enforcing exactly ONE URL per `#EXTINF` block to prevent HTTP 509 Bandwidth Limit Exceeded from upstreams with max_connections=1.

skills.name: duplicate-stream-deduper
skills.description: Use when deduplicating channels by canonical URL + tvg-id + name fingerprint to prevent multi-emit of the same upstream.

skills.name: ll-hls-cmaf-engineer
skills.description: Use when implementing genuine Low-Latency HLS with CMAF chunks, EXT-X-PART/PRELOAD-HINT/SERVER-CONTROL, blocking playlist reload, and segment/keyframe alignment.

skills.name: ll-hls-vs-classic-router
skills.description: Use when deciding whether a given playlist endpoint should be LL-HLS, classic HLS, M3U Plus channel list, or DASH — STRICT separation per RFC.

skills.name: ext-x-part-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-PART:DURATION=...,URI=...,INDEPENDENT=YES|NO` partial segments in LL-HLS media playlist.

skills.name: ext-x-part-inf-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-PART-INF:PART-TARGET=...` to declare partial segment target duration.

skills.name: ext-x-server-control-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-SERVER-CONTROL:CAN-BLOCK-RELOAD=YES,PART-HOLD-BACK=...,CAN-SKIP-UNTIL=...` to enable LL-HLS blocking behavior.

skills.name: ext-x-preload-hint-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-PRELOAD-HINT:TYPE=PART|MAP,URI=...,BYTERANGE-START=...` for partial/map prefetch.

skills.name: ext-x-rendition-report-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-RENDITION-REPORT:URI=...,LAST-MSN=...,LAST-PART=...` for cross-rendition sync.

skills.name: ext-x-skip-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-SKIP:SKIPPED-SEGMENTS=N` in delta playlists for LL-HLS.

skills.name: can-block-reload-handler
skills.description: Use when implementing `_HLS_msn=N&_HLS_part=K` query handling for blocking playlist reload responses.

skills.name: part-hold-back-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning PART-HOLD-BACK (recommended ≥ 3× PART-TARGET) to balance latency vs reliability.

skills.name: can-skip-until-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning CAN-SKIP-UNTIL (typically 6× target duration) to control how stale a delta-playlist can be.

skills.name: delta-playlist-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting delta playlists with `_HLS_skip=YES` query param honored, omitting older segments and emitting EXT-X-SKIP.

skills.name: cmaf-fmp4-mux-validator
skills.description: Use when validating that fMP4 segments contain `styp`, `sidx` (optional), `moof`+`mdat` chunks per CMAF.

skills.name: cmaf-chunk-alignment-checker
skills.description: Use when verifying CMAF chunks across renditions are byte-aligned at the same wall-clock for seamless switching.

skills.name: cmaf-init-segment-validator
skills.description: Use when validating CMAF init segment (`init.mp4` or `*.mp4`) contains `ftyp` + `moov` with required boxes (mvhd, trak/tkhd/mdia).

skills.name: cmaf-mdat-trun-parser
skills.description: Use when parsing CMAF media segment `moof/traf/trun` to enumerate sample sizes/durations and `mdat` payload offsets.

skills.name: cmaf-styp-stable-marker
skills.description: Use when emitting `styp` box with brand=`cmfc` / `cmfs` to mark stable CMAF chunks.

skills.name: low-latency-blocking-fetch-tester
skills.description: Use when testing blocking playlist reload returns 200 within PART-TARGET after the requested MSN/PART becomes available.

skills.name: independent-parts-validator
skills.description: Use when ensuring at least one INDEPENDENT=YES PART exists per CAN-BLOCK-RELOAD interval (IDR keyframe alignment).

skills.name: segment-keyframe-alignment-checker
skills.description: Use when verifying segment boundaries align with keyframes (IDR) for seek without artifacts.

skills.name: gop-structure-analyzer
skills.description: Use when analyzing GOP structure (open/closed, IDR cadence, B-frame depth) for ABR switching quality.

skills.name: http2-server-push-helper
skills.description: Use when configuring HTTP/2 server push hints for LL-HLS partial segments to reduce RTT.

skills.name: http3-quic-server-push-helper
skills.description: Use when configuring HTTP/3 QUIC datagram push for LL-HLS chunks.

skills.name: h2-stream-priority-mapper
skills.description: Use when mapping HLS playlist vs segment fetches to HTTP/2 stream priorities (playlist HIGH, segments NORMAL).

skills.name: encoded-trailer-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting HTTP trailer headers (`Trailer: X-Stream-Stats`) for chunked-transfer LL-HLS responses.

skills.name: ts-to-fmp4-repackager
skills.description: Use when repackaging MPEG-TS segments to fMP4 in-place (Bento4 / shaka-packager / ffmpeg `-c copy -f mp4`).

skills.name: ext-x-bitrate-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-BITRATE:N` (kbps) per-segment to inform ABR before fetching.

skills.name: ext-x-gap-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `#EXT-X-GAP` for missing segments to let players skip without throwing.

skills.name: ext-x-allow-cache-legacy-stripper
skills.description: Use when stripping deprecated `#EXT-X-ALLOW-CACHE` from playlists targeting modern players.

skills.name: ll-hls-player-compat-matrix
skills.description: Use when checking LL-HLS support across Safari/iOS, hls.js v1.4+, Shaka 4+, ExoPlayer 2.18+ before emitting LL-HLS tags.

skills.name: codec-quality-analyzer
skills.description: Use when analyzing codec/profile/level/bit-depth/HDR/audio of a stream via ffprobe and scoring it against a target quality matrix.

skills.name: ffmpeg-ffprobe-validator
skills.description: Use when running ffprobe/ffmpeg to extract real codec metadata (vs declared), detect upscale fakes, audio sync issues, missing tracks.

skills.name: codec-rfc6381-string-validator
skills.description: Use when generating or validating RFC 6381 codec strings inside `CODECS="..."` attributes for HLS/DASH (avc1.XXXXXX, hvc1.X.X.LXX.BX, av01.X.XX...).

skills.name: h264-avc-profile-level-parser
skills.description: Use when parsing H.264 SPS to extract profile_idc / level_idc and build `avc1.PPCCLL` codec string.

skills.name: h264-bitstream-sps-pps-extractor
skills.description: Use when extracting H.264 SPS+PPS NAL units from a TS/fMP4 sample for codec_data injection.

skills.name: h264-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `avc1.640028` (High@L4.0) / `avc1.4D4029` (Main@L4.1) etc per Apple HLS guide.

skills.name: h265-hevc-profile-level-parser
skills.description: Use when parsing HEVC VPS/SPS to extract profile/tier/level/constraint flags for `hvc1.X.X.LXX.BX` string.

skills.name: h265-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `hvc1.2.4.L153.B0` (Main10 @ L5.1) / `hvc1.1.6.L120.B0` (Main @ L4.0) etc. Profile.2=Main10, Profile.4=Main12, Profile.1=Main.

skills.name: h266-vvc-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting H.266/VVC codec string (`vvc1.X.X.X.X`) for VVC-capable HLS/DASH.

skills.name: av1-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `av01.0.10M.10` (Main 10-bit 1080p) / `av01.1.16M.10` (High 10-bit 4K) per AV1 ISOBMFF spec.

skills.name: vp9-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `vp09.02.10.10` (profile 2, level 1.0, 10-bit) per VP9 RFC.

skills.name: codec-fallback-selector
skills.description: Use when selecting fallback codec ladder when probe fails (HEVC Main10 PREFERRED → AVC High → AVC fallback) without breaking continuity.

skills.name: main10-vs-main-profile-detector
skills.description: Use when distinguishing HEVC Main10 (profile 2, 10-bit) vs Main (profile 1, 8-bit) before declaring HDR capability.

skills.name: bit-depth-detector
skills.description: Use when detecting 8-bit vs 10-bit vs 12-bit content from ffprobe stream metadata (bits_per_raw_sample / pix_fmt).

skills.name: color-primaries-bt709-bt2020-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting / validating color_primaries (bt709 / bt2020 / smpte170m) coherent with codec profile.

skills.name: transfer-characteristics-pq-hlg-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting transfer_characteristics (smpte2084 PQ / arib-std-b67 HLG / bt709 SDR) per stream metadata.

skills.name: matrix-coefficients-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting matrix_coefficients (bt709 / bt2020nc / bt2020c) for color decoding.

skills.name: chroma-subsampling-detector
skills.description: Use when detecting 4:2:0 / 4:2:2 / 4:4:4 chroma subsampling for codec/player compat.

skills.name: fps-true-vs-declared-checker
skills.description: Use when verifying real FPS (avg_frame_rate) matches declared rate (r_frame_rate) — detects 30→60 interpolation fakes.

skills.name: frame-rate-integrity-analyzer
skills.description: Use when analyzing frame rate stability over a 60s window (no dropped frames, no duplicates beyond threshold).

skills.name: keyframe-interval-detector
skills.description: Use when measuring keyframe interval (IDR cadence) to verify GOP size matches target_duration.

skills.name: bitrate-real-vs-declared-checker
skills.description: Use when comparing real bitrate (measured over 60s of segments) vs declared BANDWIDTH attribute in master playlist.

skills.name: resolution-vs-bitrate-coherence-checker
skills.description: Use when detecting `4K @ 3 Mbps` upscale fakes by cross-checking resolution against minimum viable bitrate per H.265 reference.

skills.name: fake-4k-upscale-detector
skills.description: Use when running edge-density / noise analysis on a sample frame to detect upscale (declared 4K, real 1080p).

skills.name: aac-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `mp4a.40.2` (AAC-LC) / `mp4a.40.5` (HE-AAC) / `mp4a.40.29` (HE-AACv2) per RFC 6381.

skills.name: ec3-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `ec-3` for Dolby Digital Plus (E-AC-3) audio in HLS.

skills.name: ac3-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `ac-3` for Dolby Digital (legacy) audio.

skills.name: opus-codec-string-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting `opus` codec string for Opus audio in fMP4/CMAF.

skills.name: audio-bitrate-fps-channels-detector
skills.description: Use when extracting audio sample rate / bit rate / channel layout from ffprobe.

skills.name: subtitle-track-detector
skills.description: Use when detecting WebVTT / TTML / IMSC1 / DVB-Sub / Closed-Captions tracks and emitting `#EXT-X-MEDIA TYPE=SUBTITLES`.

skills.name: audio-codec-passthrough-router
skills.description: Use when deciding `passthrough` (Atmos/DD+/DTS-X) vs `transcode to AAC-LC` per player capability matrix.

skills.name: hdr-color-science-architect
skills.description: Use when designing HDR pipeline (HDR10/HDR10+/HLG/Dolby Vision) coherence between codec metadata, MPD/HLS attrs, player capabilities, and TV display.

skills.name: hdr10-static-metadata-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting HDR10 SMPTE ST 2086 static metadata (mastering display primaries + max/min luminance) via SEI / `mdcv` box.

skills.name: hdr10plus-dynamic-metadata-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting HDR10+ dynamic metadata (SMPTE ST 2094-40) via ITU-T T.35 user-data SEI NAL units per scene.

skills.name: hlg-bt2100-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting BT.2100 HLG (Hybrid Log-Gamma) with transfer_characteristics=18 for broadcast HDR.

skills.name: dolby-vision-profile-detector
skills.description: Use when detecting Dolby Vision profile (5/8.1/8.2/8.4/10) from `dvcC` box or BL stream signaling.

skills.name: dolby-vision-profile5-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting DV Profile 5 (single-layer IPT-PQ, no fallback). CODECS="dvh1.05.06".

skills.name: dolby-vision-profile8-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting DV Profile 8.1 (single-layer cross-compat with HDR10 fallback). CODECS="hvc1.2.4.L153.B0,dvh1.08.06".

skills.name: dolby-vision-profile81-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting DV Profile 8.1 HDR10 base layer + DV RPU for compat with HDR10 TVs.

skills.name: dolby-vision-profile82-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting DV Profile 8.2 SDR base layer + DV RPU for compat with SDR TVs.

skills.name: smpte-st-2084-pq-curve-validator
skills.description: Use when validating PQ (Perceptual Quantizer) EOTF curve = transfer_characteristics=16 per SMPTE ST 2084.

skills.name: bt2020-color-gamut-validator
skills.description: Use when validating BT.2020 color primaries (color_primaries=9) for HDR content.

skills.name: bt709-color-gamut-fallback
skills.description: Use when emitting BT.709 fallback (color_primaries=1) for SDR / legacy player paths.

skills.name: max-cll-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting MaxCLL (Maximum Content Light Level) in HDR10 static metadata (cd/m² peak per pixel).

skills.name: max-fall-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting MaxFALL (Maximum Frame-Average Light Level) in HDR10 static metadata (cd/m² average).

skills.name: mastering-display-metadata-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting mastering display primaries (RGB+white point coordinates) per SMPTE ST 2086.

skills.name: tonemap-pq-to-sdr-helper
skills.description: Use when generating SDR fallback by tone-mapping PQ HDR via BT.2390 / Reinhard / Hable curves.

skills.name: tonemap-hlg-to-sdr-helper
skills.description: Use when generating SDR fallback from HLG using BT.2390 standard tone-mapping.

skills.name: hdr-fallback-cascade-builder
skills.description: Use when building HDR→SDR fallback chain (DV → HDR10+ → HDR10 → HLG → SDR BT.709) per player capability.

skills.name: sdr-color-space-validator
skills.description: Use when validating SDR streams stay in BT.709/sRGB and don't accidentally carry BT.2020 metadata.

skills.name: rec2100-pq-validator
skills.description: Use when validating BT.2100 PQ signaling: color_primaries=9, transfer_characteristics=16, matrix_coefficients=9.

skills.name: rec2100-hlg-validator
skills.description: Use when validating BT.2100 HLG signaling: color_primaries=9, transfer_characteristics=18, matrix_coefficients=9.

skills.name: lcevc-hdr-base-layer-handler
skills.description: Use when handling MPEG-5 LCEVC (Part 2) base layer + L1/L2 enhancement layers for HDR content.

skills.name: peak-luminance-enforcer
skills.description: Use when enforcing peak luminance value (default 1000 nits, 4000 nits for high-end masters) in HDR metadata.

skills.name: hdr-metadata-stripper-for-sdr-players
skills.description: Use when stripping HDR metadata for SDR-only players to prevent display-side misinterpretation.

skills.name: hdr-supported-by-player-detector
skills.description: Use when probing player/TV HDR capability (Media Capabilities API / system properties) before emitting HDR variants.

skills.name: hdr-mismatch-alert
skills.description: Use when alerting on HDR mismatch (e.g., DV declared but no `dvcC` box present, or BT.2020 with bt709 fallback).

skills.name: video-range-pq-hlg-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `VIDEO-RANGE=PQ` or `VIDEO-RANGE=HLG` attribute in HLS master `EXT-X-STREAM-INF` (HLS v8+).

skills.name: supplemental-codecs-dv-handler
skills.description: Use when emitting `SUPPLEMENTAL-CODECS="dvh1.08.06"` attribute to declare Dolby Vision enhancement layer.

skills.name: hdr10plus-sei-nal-detector
skills.description: Use when scanning H.265 SEI NAL for HDR10+ user_data_registered_itu_t_t35 with country_code=181 + provider_code.

skills.name: color-coherence-validator-bt2020-vs-bt709
skills.description: Use when alerting on color space mismatch between codec metadata (bt2020) and declared video-range (SDR/bt709).

skills.name: qoe-observability-engine
skills.description: Use when instrumenting end-to-end QoE telemetry: startup time, rebuffering ratio, stall count, bitrate switches, VMAF/SSIM/PSNR estimates, MOS score.

skills.name: startup-time-measurement
skills.description: Use when measuring time-to-first-frame from manifest fetch start to first rendered video frame (target <2s).

skills.name: rebuffering-ratio-calculator
skills.description: Use when computing rebuffer ratio = total_stall_time / total_play_time (target <0.5%).

skills.name: stall-count-tracker
skills.description: Use when counting playback stall events (buffer=0 → buffer≥playback_threshold) over a session.

skills.name: bitrate-switch-event-tracker
skills.description: Use when tracking ABR switch events (variant_old → variant_new, reason, network_state at switch).

skills.name: quality-decrease-rate-tracker
skills.description: Use when measuring quality decrease frequency (downshifts per minute) — high rate indicates network instability.

skills.name: average-bitrate-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `AVERAGE-BANDWIDTH` attribute (mean bitrate over full segment, distinct from peak BANDWIDTH).

skills.name: peak-bitrate-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `BANDWIDTH` attribute (peak bitrate over any 1-second window per HLS spec).

skills.name: throughput-ewma-calculator
skills.description: Use when computing EWMA (exponentially weighted moving average) of throughput with alpha=0.3 over rolling 12 samples.

skills.name: throughput-instant-calculator
skills.description: Use when computing instant throughput (bytes_in_last_window / window_seconds) for ABR decisions.

skills.name: ttfb-tracker
skills.description: Use when measuring Time-To-First-Byte for playlist + segment fetches (target <100ms manifest, <500ms first segment).

skills.name: ttfb-ewma-calculator
skills.description: Use when computing TTFB EWMA over rolling window to detect upstream slowdown.

skills.name: jitter-ewma-calculator
skills.description: Use when computing RFC 3550-style jitter EWMA (delay variance) over throughput samples.

skills.name: packet-loss-pct-tracker
skills.description: Use when computing packet loss % from TCP retransmits (ss -t) or QUIC packet number gaps.

skills.name: manifest-fetch-latency-tracker
skills.description: Use when tracking manifest fetch latency per upstream + status code (200/304/4xx/5xx).

skills.name: segment-fetch-latency-tracker
skills.description: Use when tracking segment fetch latency p50/p95/p99 with payload size in same window.

skills.name: segment-miss-rate-tracker
skills.description: Use when computing segment miss rate (4xx + 5xx + EOF) over total segment fetches.

skills.name: fps-drop-counter
skills.description: Use when counting dropped frames per second via player API (dropped_video_frames) — target <1 fps drops sustained.

skills.name: vmaf-score-estimator-from-metadata
skills.description: Use when estimating VMAF score (0-100) from codec/bitrate/resolution metadata without running VMAF (heuristic table).

skills.name: ssim-score-estimator-from-metadata
skills.description: Use when estimating SSIM (0-1) from codec/bitrate/resolution heuristic table.

skills.name: psnr-score-estimator-from-metadata
skills.description: Use when estimating PSNR dB from codec/bitrate/resolution heuristic.

skills.name: mos-score-mapper
skills.description: Use when mapping QoE composite to MOS (Mean Opinion Score 1-5) per ITU-T P.1203.

skills.name: prometheus-exporter-builder
skills.description: Use when emitting Prometheus `/metrics` endpoint with stream counters (TYPE counter / TYPE gauge / TYPE histogram).

skills.name: grafana-dashboard-json-builder
skills.description: Use when generating Grafana dashboard JSON (panels: throughput, TTFB, error rate, stall count, MOS).

skills.name: error-rate-403-tracker
skills.description: Use when tracking HTTP 403 rate per upstream — high rate indicates token/auth/IP block.

skills.name: error-rate-404-tracker
skills.description: Use when tracking HTTP 404 rate — high rate indicates segment expiry / playlist desync.

skills.name: error-rate-5xx-tracker
skills.description: Use when tracking HTTP 5xx rate — high rate indicates upstream overload.

skills.name: eof-rate-tracker
skills.description: Use when tracking `unexpected end of stream` rate (okhttp) — indicates toxic headers (Range, If-None-Match).

skills.name: qoe-composite-scorer
skills.description: Use when computing composite QoE score (weights: startup 30%, rebuffer 40%, quality 20%, switches 10%) → 0-100.

skills.name: telchemy-vstq-vsmq-tr101290-validator
skills.description: Use when validating Telchemy VSTQ/VSMQ + ETSI TR 101 290 priority 1/2/3 for IPTV broadcast.

skills.name: nginx-openresty-streaming-proxy
skills.description: Use when configuring nginx + OpenResty Lua as reverse proxy for HLS/CMAF (proxy_pass, timeouts, buffers, cache strategy, Lua phases).

skills.name: nginx-syntax-validator-nginx-t
skills.description: Use when validating nginx config with `nginx -t` before reload — REQUIRED step before any deploy.

skills.name: openresty-lua-syntax-validator
skills.description: Use when validating Lua module syntax with `luac -p file.lua` before nginx reload.

skills.name: nginx-config-snapshot-helper
skills.description: Use when snapshotting live config (`nginx -T > /tmp/nginx-pre-$(date +%s).conf`) as byte-exact rollback baseline.

skills.name: proxy-pass-helper
skills.description: Use when configuring `proxy_pass http://upstream` with explicit Host header preservation and chunked-transfer support.

skills.name: proxy-set-header-sanitizer
skills.description: Use when reviewing every `proxy_set_header` directive for toxic headers (Range, If-None-Match, etc.).

skills.name: proxy-pass-request-headers-off-enforcer
skills.description: Use when enforcing `proxy_pass_request_headers off` in shield locations to prevent 30+ X-* garbage headers from leaking to upstream (fingerprint → 401).

skills.name: proxy-read-timeout-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning `proxy_read_timeout` (60s minimum for IPTV; lower risks freeze on segment latency spike).

skills.name: proxy-send-timeout-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning `proxy_send_timeout` (60s typical for upload-heavy LL-HLS).

skills.name: proxy-connect-timeout-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning `proxy_connect_timeout` (5s typical to fail fast on dead upstreams).

skills.name: proxy-buffering-helper
skills.description: Use when deciding `proxy_buffering on/off` (off for LL-HLS streaming, on for classic HLS).

skills.name: proxy-buffer-size-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning `proxy_buffer_size` (4k-16k typical; large enough for response headers).

skills.name: proxy-busy-buffers-size-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning `proxy_busy_buffers_size` to balance memory vs throughput.

skills.name: keepalive-zero-enforcer-for-xtream
skills.description: Use when enforcing `keepalive 0` (or omitting upstream { keepalive N }) for Xtream upstreams with max_connections=1 to prevent session bleed.

skills.name: proxy-cache-path-validator
skills.description: Use when validating `proxy_cache_path` placement (/dev/shm for hot, with full nginx RESTART required for path changes — reload SILENTLY fails).

skills.name: proxy-cache-key-builder
skills.description: Use when building `proxy_cache_key` ($scheme$proxy_host$uri$is_args$args; exclude credentials, time-vary tokens).

skills.name: proxy-cache-bypass-helper
skills.description: Use when configuring `proxy_cache_bypass` for ?nocache=1 / no-store / dynamic playlists.

skills.name: proxy-cache-use-stale-handler
skills.description: Use when emitting `proxy_cache_use_stale error timeout updating http_500 http_502 http_503 http_504` for graceful degradation.

skills.name: proxy-next-upstream-handler
skills.description: Use when configuring `proxy_next_upstream error timeout http_500 http_502 http_503 http_504` (NEVER on 4xx — would mask provider issues).

skills.name: limit-req-zone-helper
skills.description: Use when defining `limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=X:10m rate=Yr/s` and `limit_req zone=X burst=Z` per location.

skills.name: limit-conn-zone-helper
skills.description: Use when defining `limit_conn_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=Y:10m` and `limit_conn Y N` to cap concurrent connections.

skills.name: rate-limit-passthrough-doctrine
skills.description: Use when REMOVING aggressive rate limits in single-user IPTV scenarios per autopista doctrine — performance > protection.

skills.name: circuit-breaker-removal-doctrine
skills.description: Use when REMOVING circuit breaker logic per autopista doctrine — Lua reactor must be passthrough/telemetry-only, never ngx.exit(503).

skills.name: sub-filter-disabled-for-video
skills.description: Use when ensuring `sub_filter_types` does NOT include video/* (would corrupt fMP4/TS payload).

skills.name: gzip-off-for-video-enforcer
skills.description: Use when enforcing `gzip off` in video locations (gzip on TS/fMP4/MP4 wastes CPU + breaks Range requests).

skills.name: ngx-shared-dict-helper
skills.description: Use when defining `lua_shared_dict name 10m` for cross-worker state (telemetry, circuit metrics, config cache).

skills.name: access-by-lua-file-per-location-rule
skills.description: Use when respecting nginx rule of ONE `access_by_lua_file` per location — combine multiple checks in single Lua file if needed.

skills.name: header-filter-by-lua-helper
skills.description: Use when mutating response headers in `header_filter_by_lua_file` phase (after upstream response, before body sent).

skills.name: body-filter-by-lua-helper
skills.description: Use when mutating response body in `body_filter_by_lua_file` phase (e.g., inject m3u8 directives at the edge).

skills.name: log-by-lua-helper-non-blocking
skills.description: Use when running telemetry in `log_by_lua_file` phase (AFTER response sent, zero blocking impact on client).

skills.name: upstream-failover-handler
skills.description: Use when configuring upstream block with multiple servers + backup keyword for failover on 5xx/timeout only (NEVER on 401/403/429 per HTTP 407 Proxy Auth doctrine).

skills.name: stream-watchdog-sre
skills.description: Use when designing 365-day reliability watchdog: process/port/endpoint/channel health checks, auto-restart, backoff, circuit breaker, alert routing, status JSON.

skills.name: systemd-unit-builder
skills.description: Use when writing `/etc/systemd/system/X.service` unit with [Unit]/[Service]/[Install] sections, Type=, Restart=, RestartSec=.

skills.name: systemd-watchdog-builder
skills.description: Use when configuring `WatchdogSec=N` + sd_notify(WATCHDOG=1) in daemon code for systemd-driven liveness.

skills.name: systemd-timer-builder
skills.description: Use when writing `/etc/systemd/system/X.timer` with OnCalendar / OnBootSec / OnUnitActiveSec for scheduled jobs.

skills.name: systemd-restart-on-failure-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning `Restart=on-failure RestartSec=10 StartLimitInterval=60 StartLimitBurst=3` for safe restart loops.

skills.name: systemd-secrets-loader
skills.description: Use when loading secrets via `LoadCredential=` (systemd 250+) instead of EnvironmentFile= with secrets in plaintext.

skills.name: cron-schedule-validator
skills.description: Use when validating crontab syntax (5 fields, valid ranges) and checking for duplicate jobs.

skills.name: logrotate-config-builder
skills.description: Use when writing `/etc/logrotate.d/X` with daily / weekly / size= rotation + compress + postrotate signal.

skills.name: dev-shm-permissions-enforcer
skills.description: Use when enforcing chmod 644 on /dev/shm files written by root daemons (umask 077 default → nginx www-data cannot read → telemetry vacía).

skills.name: dev-shm-budget-monitor
skills.description: Use when monitoring /dev/shm usage (default tmpfs cap 50% RAM; OOM if hot files grow unbounded).

skills.name: process-health-check
skills.description: Use when implementing pidfile + `pgrep -f process_name` health check with restart-on-zombie.

skills.name: port-health-check
skills.description: Use when checking `ss -tln | grep :PORT` for listener presence and probing with curl/nc.

skills.name: endpoint-health-check
skills.description: Use when implementing /health endpoint returning 200 OK + JSON {status, version, uptime, deps}.

skills.name: channel-critical-health-check
skills.description: Use when probing N critical channels (Sky Sports, ESPN, etc.) every 60s, alerting on consecutive failures.

skills.name: provider-health-check
skills.description: Use when probing per-provider health (Xtream login + canal probe + error rate) with cooldown on failure.

skills.name: circuit-breaker-pattern
skills.description: Use when implementing closed/open/half-open circuit breaker — but RESPECT autopista doctrine (do NOT add breaker for single-user IPTV).

skills.name: retry-backoff-pattern
skills.description: Use when implementing exponential backoff (base 2s, cap 60s) with jitter for retry loops.

skills.name: failover-pattern
skills.description: Use when implementing failover between primary/backup upstreams on 5xx/timeout (NEVER on 403/429 per HTTP 407 doctrine).

skills.name: auto-restart-safe-helper
skills.description: Use when implementing safe auto-restart (verify deps healthy + cooldown + drain) before systemctl restart.

skills.name: status-summary-json-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting /status.json with {channels: [{id, name, last_ok, error_rate}], providers, system}.

skills.name: alert-channel-router
skills.description: Use when routing alerts (email/Slack/Telegram/Pushover) per severity (info/warn/critical) with rate limit + dedup.

skills.name: sre-runbook-365-days-builder
skills.description: Use when writing operational runbook covering: deploy, rollback, common incidents, dashboards, on-call rotation.

skills.name: hetzner-cpx-specs-validator
skills.description: Use when validating Hetzner CPX21 specs (3 vCPU AMD EPYC, 4 GB RAM, 40 GB SSD) match workload — upgrade to CCX23 for 4K transcode.

skills.name: hetzner-backup-scheduler
skills.description: Use when scheduling Hetzner snapshot backups (weekly) + filesystem-level backups (daily via rsync to local).

skills.name: apt-package-pin-validator
skills.description: Use when pinning apt packages via /etc/apt/preferences.d to prevent unsupervised upgrade breaking nginx/openresty/lua versions.

skills.name: kernel-tuning-net-core
skills.description: Use when tuning /etc/sysctl.d/99-streaming.conf (net.core.rmem_max, wmem_max, somaxconn, netdev_max_backlog).

skills.name: sysctl-tcp-bbr-enabler
skills.description: Use when enabling TCP BBR via `net.core.default_qdisc=fq` + `net.ipv4.tcp_congestion_control=bbr` (kernel 4.9+).

skills.name: sysctl-fq-codel-enabler
skills.description: Use when enabling fq_codel qdisc to combat bufferbloat on streaming uplink.

skills.name: ufw-firewall-rules-builder
skills.description: Use when configuring ufw rules: allow 22/443/80, deny inbound 8099 (internal API), allow outbound to upstreams.

skills.name: ssh-hardening-helper
skills.description: Use when hardening sshd_config: PermitRootLogin no, PasswordAuthentication no, key-only auth, fail2ban for brute-force protection.

skills.name: vps-network-tcp-quic-tuning
skills.description: Use when tuning TCP/UDP stack for IPTV throughput: BBR, initcwnd, MTU, HTTP/2/3, QUIC, fq_codel, WireGuard nested.

skills.name: tcp-bbr-congestion-control-enabler
skills.description: Use when activating TCP BBR (Bottleneck Bandwidth and RTT) for better throughput on long-fat networks vs default CUBIC.

skills.name: tcp-cubic-fallback-helper
skills.description: Use when keeping CUBIC as fallback per route (route metric net.ipv4.tcp_congestion_control_route).

skills.name: tcp-initcwnd-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning initcwnd (initial congestion window) via `ip route change ... initcwnd 100` — current doctrine: 400 packets for IPTV high-BDP paths.

skills.name: tcp-initrwnd-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning initrwnd (initial receive window) via `ip route change ... initrwnd 400` paired with initcwnd.

skills.name: tcp-rto-min-locker
skills.description: Use when locking rto_min=40ms via `ip route change ... rto_min 40ms` for low-RTT routes to prevent slow retransmit.

skills.name: tcp-mtu-discovery-handler
skills.description: Use when probing path MTU via `tracepath` and locking via `ip route change ... mtu lock M` to avoid PMTU black holes.

skills.name: tcp-fastopen-enabler
skills.description: Use when enabling TCP Fast Open via `net.ipv4.tcp_fastopen=3` to save RTT on repeated connections.

skills.name: tcp-keepalive-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning keepalive (tcp_keepalive_time=60, _intvl=10, _probes=3) for proxy long-lived connections.

skills.name: tcp-syn-flood-protection
skills.description: Use when enabling SYN cookies via `net.ipv4.tcp_syncookies=1` for DDoS resilience.

skills.name: http2-enabler

skills.name: http3-quic-enabler
skills.description: Use when enabling HTTP/3 via `listen 443 quic reuseport;` + `add_header Alt-Svc 'h3=":443"; ma=86400';` (nginx 1.25+ with QUIC module).

skills.name: quic-bbr-tuner
skills.description: Use when tuning QUIC congestion controller (BBR vs CUBIC) via openssl-quic / quiche settings.

skills.name: h2-stream-multiplexing
skills.description: Use when leveraging HTTP/2 stream multiplexing for concurrent segment fetches over single TCP connection.

skills.name: h2-server-push-helper
skills.description: Use when emitting `http2_push /init.mp4;` or Link rel=preload headers for LL-HLS init+first part push.

skills.name: tls-1-3-enforcer
skills.description: Use when enforcing `ssl_protocols TLSv1.3;` (cipher choice auto-managed by OpenSSL 1.1.1+).

skills.name: tls-1-2-fallback

skills.name: alpn-protocol-negotiator

skills.name: ocsp-stapling-helper
skills.description: Use when enabling `ssl_stapling on; ssl_stapling_verify on;` to reduce TLS handshake latency.

skills.name: hsts-header-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains` for HTTPS lock-in.

skills.name: cors-controlled-emitter

skills.name: dns-doh-cloudflare-helper

skills.name: dns-google-fallback

skills.name: unbound-recursor-config-builder

skills.name: wireguard-tunnel-builder

skills.name: wireguard-health-monitor-builder

skills.name: failover-wg-peer-router
skills.description: Use when implementing sub-second failover between WG peers (Miami ↔ Brasil) via wg-health-fast + sentinel 407 hook + conntrack flush.

skills.name: tcp-fast-open-cookie-handler

skills.name: mtu-anycast-anyaddr-discovery
skills.description: Use when probing MTU per anycast destination via packetdrill / scapy fragmentation tests.

skills.name: hls-js-buffer-controller-tuner

skills.name: tivimate-profile-builder

skills.name: vlc-network-caching-tuner

skills.name: androidtv-onn-4k-tuner

skills.name: androidtv-decoder-h264-vs-h265-router

skills.name: androidtv-hdr-capability-detector

skills.name: smart-tv-tizen-webos-compat-matrix

skills.name: secure-header-profiler

skills.name: toxic-header-blocker-range-bytes-0
skills.description: Use when blocking `Range: bytes=0-` requests that cause 400/403/EOF on many IPTV upstreams.

skills.name: toxic-header-blocker-if-none-match-star

skills.name: toxic-header-blocker-if-modified-since

skills.name: toxic-header-blocker-te-trailers

skills.name: toxic-header-blocker-priority

skills.name: toxic-header-blocker-upgrade-insecure-requests

skills.name: user-agent-pool-rotator

skills.name: referer-allowlist-enforcer

skills.name: origin-cors-controlled-emitter

skills.name: accept-encoding-identity-enforcer

skills.name: cache-control-no-cache-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `Cache-Control: no-cache` on dynamic .m3u8 playlists to prevent intermediate cache poisoning.

skills.name: pragma-no-cache-emitter

skills.name: connection-keep-alive-vs-close-router

skills.name: hsts-strict-transport-security-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload` for HTTPS lock-in.

skills.name: x-content-type-options-nosniff-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff` to prevent MIME sniff attacks.

skills.name: x-frame-options-emitter

skills.name: x-xss-protection-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block` for legacy browser XSS filter.

skills.name: content-security-policy-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting CSP (`default-src 'self'; media-src https: blob:`) for player iframe.

skills.name: referrer-policy-emitter

skills.name: permissions-policy-emitter
skills.description: Use when emitting `Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()` to restrict browser features.

skills.name: basic-auth-handler-bcrypt

skills.name: signed-url-hmac-builder
skills.description: Use when generating HMAC-SHA256 signed URLs `?token=<hex>&expires=<ts>` for time-limited authorized access.

skills.name: token-ttl-rotator
skills.description: Use when rotating tokens with TTL ≤24h and refreshing via signed refresh endpoint.

skills.name: env-file-secret-redactor
skills.description: Use when redacting .env values from logs (replace `=value` with `=***REDACTED***` before write).

skills.name: secret-scanner-pre-commit
skills.description: Use when installing pre-commit hook running gitleaks / trufflehog / detect-secrets to block accidental commits with API keys.

skills.name: dependency-audit-npm-pip-pip-audit
skills.description: Use when running `npm audit --production` / `pip-audit` / `safety check` to scan for CVE in deps.

skills.name: sbom-generator
skills.description: Use when generating SBOM (CycloneDX / SPDX) via syft / cyclonedx-bom for supply-chain audit.

skills.name: cve-scanner-trivy-osv
skills.description: Use when scanning Docker images + filesystem with trivy / osv-scanner for known CVEs.

skills.name: rate-limit-anti-abuse-builder
skills.description: Use when implementing rate limit per IP / per token to prevent abuse without harming legitimate single-user IPTV (respect autopista doctrine).

skills.name: anti-hotlink-legitimate-builder
skills.description: Use when implementing referer check + signed URL combo to prevent unauthorized hotlink (legitimate, not for blocking authorized clients).
